headline: Paychex (PAYX): Buy, Sell, or Hold Post Q1 Earnings?
summary: Over the past six months, Paychex’s stock price fell to $100.59. Shareholders have lost 11.3% of their capital, which is disappointing considering the S&P 500 has climbed by 10.9%. This might have investors contemplating their next move.

headline: 2 Growth Stocks to Stash and 1 Facing Challenges
summary: Growth is oxygen. But when it evaporates, the consequences can be severe - ask anyone who bought Cisco in the Dot-Com Bubble or newer investors who lived through the 2020 to 2022 COVID cycle.

headline: Penguin Solutions, Inc. (PENG) Moves 18.3% Higher: Will This Strength Last?
summary: Penguin Solutions, Inc. (PENG) was a big mover last session on higher-than-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions might not help the stock continue moving higher in the near term.
